differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic adverse reaction (drug fever/syndrome)
next_steps: Perform magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to assess for biliary obstruction
Check serum ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor, triglycerides, and fibrinogen levels to evaluate for HLH
Check serum cortisol and ACTH levels
Send peripheral blood smear for morulae identification (Anaplasma)
Consider liver biopsy if liver enzymes continue to trend upward and imaging remains inconclusive
Maintain cessation of dabrafenib and trametinib until drug toxicity is ruled out
